exploreUrl:
<js>
eval(String(source.loginUrl));
var exploreUrl = [];
title = '✣　　　　　  ✣  标　　签  ✣  　　　　　✣';
exploreUrl.push(explore(title, '', 1, 1, false));
kind = [
    '全部','神幻','女主','韩漫','百合','修真','恐怖','耽美',
    '穿越','悬疑','真人','古风','科幻','热血','霸总','恋爱',
    '生活','后宫','搞笑','校园'
];
link = [
    '全部','神幻','女主','韩漫','百合','修真','恐怖','耽美',
    '穿越','悬疑','真人','古风','科幻','热血','霸总','恋爱',
    '生活','后宫','搞笑','校园'
];
Area = `{{get('area',Get('o'))}}`;
End = `{{get('end',Get('q'))}}`;
for (j in kind) {
    url = `{{Get('url')}}/booklist?cate=${link[j]}&area=${Area}&end=${End}&page={{page}}`;
    exploreUrl.push(explore(kind[j], url, 1, 0.2, false));
}
BID = (kind.length % 4) < 1 ? 0 : (4 - (kind.length % 4));
for (i = 0; i < BID; i++) {
   exploreUrl.push(explore('', '', 1, 0.2, false)); 
}
//exploreUrl.splice(52, 0, explore('', '', 1, 0.2, false));
JSON.stringify(exploreUrl);
</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
(() => {
    let html = java.ajax("/"); 
    
    // 阅读 App 在执行发现页 JS 时，可以直接通过变量 page 获取当前页码
    // 如果 page 未定义，默认设为 1
    let p = (typeof page !== 'undefined') ? page : 1;

    const getUrl = (baseUrl) => {
        // 第一页保持原样，后续页码拼接 {{page}}.html
        // 注意：这里直接返回字符串结果，避免在字符串内部嵌套引号
        return p == 1 ? baseUrl : baseUrl + p + ".html";
    };

    let list = [
        { "title": "最新", "url": getUrl("/rank/new/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } },
        { "title": "热门", "url": getUrl("/rank/hot/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } },
        { "title": "完本", "url": getUrl("/rank/complete/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } }
    ];
    
    // 分类
    list.push({ "title": "分类", "url": "", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1 } });
    let reg1 = /<a href="(\/category\/\d+\/)">(.*?)<\/a>/g;
    let match1;
    while ((match1 = reg1.exec(html)) !== null) {
        list.push({
            "title": match1[2],
            "url": getUrl("" + match1[1]) + "/{{page}}.html" +  ",{\"webView\":true}",
            "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.2 }
        });
    }

    // 标签
    list.push({ "title": "标签", "url": "", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1 } });
    let reg = /<a href="(\/tag\/\d+\/)">(.*?)<\/a>/g;
    let match;
    while ((match = reg.exec(html)) !== null) {
        list.push({
            "title": match[2],
            "url": getUrl("" + match[1]) + "/{{page}}.html" + ",{\"webView\":true}",
            "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.2 }
        });
    }
    
    return JSON.stringify(list);
})()
</js>

var Proxy = Map('代理：').split(",");
headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36 EdgA/127.0.0.0",

JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>

header:
<js>
var Proxy = Map('代理：').split(",");
headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36 EdgA/127.0.0.0",
    "proxy": Proxy.some(value => parseInt(value, 10) == parseInt(Get('ci0'), 10)) ? '' : Proxy[0],
}
cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers"),JSON.stringify(headers));
JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>

header:
<js>
var Proxy = Map('代理：').split(",");
headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36 EdgA/127.0.0.0",
    "Cookie": cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "cookie")) || cookie.getCookie(Get('url')),
    "proxy": Proxy.some(value => parseInt(value, 10) == parseInt(Get('ci0'), 10)) ? '' : Proxy[0],
}
cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers"),JSON.stringify(headers));
JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>

const list = [];
const push = (title,url,size) => list.push({
	 title,
	 url,
	 style: {layout_flexBasisPercent: size}
});

const sourceType = Object.keys(myFx);
list.push({
	 "title": "sel",
	 "viewName": "'选择 [小说 / 漫画]'",
	 "type": "select",
	 "action": "java.refreshExplore()",
	 "chars": sourceType,
	 "default": sourceType[0],
	 "style": {"layout_flexBasisPercent": 1}
})

let mySelect = infoMap["sel"];
try{
  myFx[String(mySelect)].forEach(fx => {
	   let {title, content, tpl, size} = fx;
	   if(title) push(title, "", 1);
	   content.split("
").forEach(x => {
      let [n, u] = x.split("::");
      push(n, tpl.replace("$$", u), size??0.29)
	   })
  })
}catch(e){java.longToast("
若没有发现列表，点击下拉列表选择漫画试试")}

infoMap.save();

JSON.stringify(list)

ruleBookInfo.author: [property="og:novel:author"]@content
ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
{{@@[property$=chapter_name]@content}}
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

<js>
var javaImport = new JavaImporter();
javaImport.importPackage(
    Packages.java.lang,
    Packages.javax.crypto.spec,
    Packages.javax.crypto,
    Packages.android.util
);

with(javaImport){
    function decrypt(str){
        var key=SecretKeySpec(String("ZKYm5vSUhvcG9IbXNZTG1pb2").getBytes(),"DESede");
        var iv=IvParameterSpec(String("01234567").getBytes());
        var bytes=Base64.decode(String(str).getBytes(),2);
        var chipher=Cipher.getInstance("DESede/CBC/PKCS5Padding");
        chipher.init(2,key,iv);
        return String(chipher.doFinal(bytes));
    }
}
decrypt(JSON.parse(result).data.replace(/(\r\n)|(\n)|(\r)/g,''))
</js>result

var javaImport = new JavaImporter();
javaImport.importPackage(
    Packages.java.lang,
    Packages.javax.crypto.spec,
    Packages.javax.crypto,
    Packages.android.util
);

with(javaImport){
    function decrypt(str){
        var key=SecretKeySpec(String("ZKYm5vSUhvcG9IbXNZTG1pb2").getBytes(),"DESede");
        var iv=IvParameterSpec(String("01234567").getBytes());
        var bytes=Base64.decode(String(str).getBytes(),2);
        var chipher=Cipher.getInstance("DESede/CBC/PKCS5Padding");
        chipher.init(2,key,iv);
        return String(chipher.doFinal(bytes));
    }
}
decrypt(JSON.parse(result).data.replace(/(\r\n)|(\n)|(\r)/g,''))
</js>result

if(baseUrl.indexOf('read')>-1){
	url = book.origin + '/' +java.getString("@@.readcontent@a@href")
	html = java.ajax(url)
	result = html.match(/var downloadurl = "([\s\S]+?)";/)[1]
}else{
	url = baseUrl.replace(/.*-(\d+).*/, "https://www.527txt.com/txt-xx/softdownfree.asp?softid=$1&ckm=mianfei")
	html = java.ajax(url)
	java.setContent(html)
	result = java.getString("@@text.第一下载地址(首选)@href")
}
</js>

@js:
let SHOW_R18_GENRE, SHOW_GENERAL_NEW, SHOW_GENERAL_RANK, SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE
try {
    settings = JSON.parse(String(source.variableComment).match(RegExp(/{([\s\S]*?)}/gm)))
    SHOW_R18_GENRE = settings.SHOW_R18_GENRE         // 发现：热门分类显示R18小说
    SHOW_GENERAL_NEW = settings.SHOW_GENERAL_NEW     // 发现：最新、企划、约稿显示一般小说
    SHOW_GENERAL_RANK = settings.SHOW_GENERAL_RANK   // 发现：排行榜显示一般小说
    SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE = settings.SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE // 发现：热门分类显示一般小说
} catch (e) {
    SHOW_R18_GENRE = false
    SHOW_GENERAL_NEW = false
    SHOW_GENERAL_RANK = false
    SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE = false
}

let likeTagLinks = [{"📌 喜欢标签 📌":""}]
let othersBookmarks = [{"❤️ 他人收藏 ❤️": ""}]

li = li.concat(normal)
li = li.concat(r18New)
if (SHOW_GENERAL_NEW === true) {
    li = li.concat(generalNew)
}
li = li.concat(r18Rank)
if (SHOW_GENERAL_RANK === true) {
    li = li.concat(generalRank)
}
if (SHOW_R18_GENRE === true) {
    li = li.concat(r18Genre)
}
if (SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE === true) {
    li = li.concat(generalgGenre)
}
sleepToast('使用指南🔖\n\n发现 - 更新 - 点击"🔰 使用指南" - 查看')

// 收藏标签
let likeTags = getFromCache("likeTags")
if (likeTags !== null && likeTags.length >= 1) {
    likeTags.forEach(tag => {
        let tagLink = {}
        tagLink[tag] = `${urlSearchNovel(tag, "{{page}}")}`
        likeTagLinks.push(tagLink)
    })
    li = li.concat(likeTagLinks)
}

// 他人收藏
let likeAuthors = getFromCacheMap("likeAuthors")
if (likeAuthors.size > 0) {
    likeAuthors.forEach((authorName, authorId) => {
        let bookmark = {}
        bookmark[authorName] = urlUserBookmarks(authorId)
        othersBookmarks.push(bookmark)
    })
    li = li.concat(othersBookmarks)
}

// 添加格式
li.forEach(item => {
    item.title = Object.keys(item)[0]
    item.url = Object.values(item)[0]
    delete item[Object.keys(item)[0]]
    item.style = {}
    item.style.layout_flexGrow = 1
    item.style.layout_flexShrink = 1
    item.style.layout_alignSelf = "auto"
    item.style.layout_wrapBefore = "false"
    if (item.url === "") {
        item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent = 1
    } else {
        item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent = -1
    }
})

JSON.stringify(li)

variableComment:
🚫 屏蔽作者(本地)：
▶️设置方法：打开小说 - 菜单 - 登录 - 🚫 屏蔽作者

🚫 屏蔽标签/描述(本地)：
1️⃣编辑书源：菜单 - 登录 - 点击【 👀 查看屏蔽】
2️⃣切换列表：点击按钮，切换至【相应屏蔽列表】
3️⃣输入内容：在【输入内容】处输入屏蔽内容
4️⃣屏蔽作者：点击【🚫 加入屏蔽】，屏蔽该内容

📌 喜欢标签(本地)：
1️⃣编辑书源：菜单 - 登录 ，找到输入内容
2️⃣输入内容：输入标签，点击【📌 喜欢标签】

❤️ 查看他人收藏：
1️⃣编辑书源：菜单 - 登录 ，找到输入内容
2️⃣输入内容：输入作者ID，点击【❤️ 他人收藏】

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js> 
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));
var book = {
	name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|[(（].*[）)]/g, ''),
	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
	latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g, ''),
	intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + og('description').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
	url: og('novel:read_url'),
};
book;
</js>

uz = Packages.cn.hutool.core.util.ZipUtil;
decode(uz.unGzip(das))
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
list=java.getElements('ul li')
let data=[];
if(list.length>1){
	for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
data.push({
	title:list[i].select("a").text(),
	href:list[i].select("a").attr("href")
			})
}}else{
id=java.get("id");
url=`https://m.yuzhaiwen.com/novel/${id}.html`;
result=java.ajax(url);
page1=String(java.getString("text.开始阅读@href",result)).match(/\/\d+\/(\d+)\.html/)?.[1]||null;
pages=String(java.getString(".chapterList@li.-1@a.-1@html",result)).match(/\/\d+\/(\d+)\.html/)?.[1]||null;
  for (let i = page1; i <= pages; i++) {
data.push({
	title:`第${i - page1 + 1}章`,
	href:`/novel/${id}/${i}.html`
	})
}}
//java.log(JSON.stringify(data))
data
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: [property$=author]@content
ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
{{@@[property$=chapter_name]@content}}
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3
ruleBookInfo.name: [property$=book_name]@content

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
var data=[]
list=java.getElements('.g')
c=java.getElements('.content')
for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){
	text=list[i].select('a').text()
	href=list[i].select('a').attr('href')
	author=list[i].select('font').text()
	desc=c[i].text()
	data.push(JSON.stringify({
		text,href,desc,author
	}))
}
data
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
function dec(encData,rawKey){
	key=java.md5Encode(rawKey);
	return java.aesBase64DecodeToString(encData,key.substring(16),"AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding",key.substring(0,16))
};
m=src.match(/d\("([^"]+)",\s*"([^"]+)"\)/);
decrypted=dec(m[1],m[2]).replaceAll(/[\u200A-\u200F]/,"");
host=String(java.toURL(baseUrl).host);
result=["www.peakbooks.cc","www.ebook8.cc","www.mobvista.cc","www.gaysay.com","www.lengku8.cc"].includes(host)?java.t2s(decrypted):decrypted;
result
</js>

@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
result = JSON.parse(result)
resultlength = result.length
for (var i=0; i<resultlength; resultlength--){
 let chapter = JSON.parse(java.ajax("https://api.kadokado.com.tw/v2/collection/withIsPurchased?publishedOnly=true&collectionId=" + result[resultlength - 1]["id"].match(/\d+/)[0]))
 Array.prototype.splice.apply(result, [resultlength, 0].concat(chapter))
 }
for (var i = 0; i < result.length; i++) {
  if (!isNaN(result[i].id)) {
  result[i].id = "https://api.kadokado.com.tw/v2/chapter/" + result[i].id
  } else {
  result[i].id = ""
  }
 if (result[i].hasOwnProperty('free')) {
 result[i].free = !result[i].free
 }
}
result = result
</js>
